products.name: Hibbent Portable Bidet
products.description: Large 500ml capacity manual squeeze bottle designed for comfort and precision. Includes a discreet travel bag and extended nozzle for ease of use wherever you go.

products.name: Diatomaceous Earth Bath Mat
products.description: A natural, hard-stone mat that absorbs moisture instantly and dries in minutes. Antimicrobial and slip-resistant, it eliminates dampness and odors from your bathroom floor.

products.name: Luxury Spin Mop & Bucket System
products.description: High-efficiency 360-degree rotating mop with a dual-chamber bucket for effective wringing. Features locking wheels for easy mobility across all hard floor surfaces.

products.name: Compressed Travel Towels (4-Pack)
products.description: Space-saving disposable bath towels that expand when dampened. Ultra-absorbent and lightweight, making them perfect for camping, gym, or international travel.

products.name: Foldable Multi-Layer Drying Rack
products.description: Heavy-duty stainless steel laundry rack with three tiers of drying space. Foldable design for easy storage when not in use, suitable for large loads of laundry.

products.name: Entryway Coat & Shoe Organizer
products.description: Minimalist matte black metal frame featuring 4 storage tiers for shoes and 8 heavy-duty hooks for coats, bags, and hats. Includes a top shelf for added storage.

products.name: Floral Geometric Art Area Rug
products.description: Premium large-format rug featuring a modern abstract floral pattern with marble accents. Soft-touch pile provides luxury comfort for living rooms and bedrooms.

products.name: KeLeDi Cordless Handheld Vacuum
products.description: High-suction cordless vacuum with a 2-in-1 stick and handheld design. Features a 5-stage HEPA filtration system and a 100° rotating handle for easy maneuverability.

products.name: Portable Hands-Free Neck Fan
products.description: Ergonomic, bladeless neck fan designed for ultimate hands-free cooling. Safe for all hair types with 3 adjustable speeds and whisper-quiet operation.

products.name: Mini Travel Steam Iron
products.description: Ultra-compact travel iron with a 180° rotatable handle and rapid-heat steam function. Ceramic soleplate ensures smooth gliding over all fabric types.

products.name: H2O USB Ultrasonic Humidifier
products.description: Sleek cool-mist humidifier with 7-color ambient lighting. Quiet ultrasonic technology makes it ideal for bedside use to maintain optimal air humidity.

products.name: Aurora Water Spray Mop
products.description: Ergonomic spray mop with an integrated 350ml tank and precision mist trigger. 360-degree rotating head reaches deep into corners and under furniture.

products.name: Slivers Criest Deluxe Dry Iron
products.description: Premium 1000W dry iron with 5 speed heat adjustment. Featuring a super-lightweight design with an indicator light and precision tip for tight corners.

products.name: Wooden X-Frame Dish Rack
products.description: Eco-friendly bamboo X-frame dish rack with black powder-coated wire shelves. Includes a large drainage mat and heavy-duty slots for plates and bowls.

products.name: Round Non-Slip Cutting Boards
products.description: Stylishly designed circular cutting boards with textured surfaces to prevent slipping. Featuring convenient hanging handles for space-saving organization.

products.name: Classic Belgian Waffle Maker
products.description: Traditional non-stick waffle iron for even browning and easy release. Compact, vertical-storage design with a cool-touch handle for family-safe use.

products.name: Over-Sink Kitchen Organizer
products.description: Heavy-duty 95cm stainless steel rack that fits directly over the sink. Includes dedicated modules for knives, hooks, detergent, and cutting boards.

products.name: Stainless Steel Vacuum Flasks
products.description: Double-walled vacuum insulated flasks in a professional 5-color set. Keeps beverages hot for 12 hours or cold for up to 24 hours with a leak-proof cap.

products.name: Rolling Kitchen Storage Rack
products.description: 5-tier mobile storage rack with breathable mesh baskets and locking wheels. Perfect for organizing vegetables, fruits, and bulky pantry items.

products.name: Collapsible Sink Cutting Board
products.description: 4-in-1 kitchen tool that acts as a cutting board, rinsing basket, and storage bowl. Collapsible design saves up to 70% of storage space.

products.name: Evryealth 19-Piece Kitchen Set
products.description: Full culinary set including premium silicone utensils with wooden handles and high-precision chef knives. Heat-resistant and non-stick safe.

products.name: Rotating Vegetable Basket
products.description: Dual-layer colander and fruit basket with a rotating pivot for easy rinsing and draining. Inner basket remains horizontal during pour to prevent spills.

products.name: Electric Sandwich & Panini Maker
products.description: Rapid-heat sandwich press with non-stick coated plates. Features an easy-lock handle and indicator lights for perfectly toasted paninis in minutes.
